message:
feat(policy): integrate PolicyDecisionLog into PolicyEngine

Wire the append-only PolicyDecisionLog (introduced in a86b4c31) into
the PolicyEngine so every authorize() call produces a forensic record.

config.rs:
- Add decision_log field (DecisionLogConfig) to SafetyConfig with
  default initialization, making the log configurable via the standard
  safety config surface

policy.rs — PolicyEngine integration:
- Add decision_log field (PolicyDecisionLog) to PolicyEngine
- Add with_decision_log_config() builder for custom config
- Add decision_log()/decision_log_mut() accessors for querying and
  export
- Split authorize() into evaluate_authorization() (pure logic) and
  record_to_decision_log() (side-effect), so the decision is computed
  before recording
- record_to_decision_log() maps PolicyDecision variants to
  DecisionOutcome, captures action/actor/surface/pane_id/rule_id/
  reason/rules_evaluated count with millisecond timestamps

Tests (8 new integration tests):
- decision_log_records_allow: verify allow decisions are logged
- decision_log_records_deny: verify deny decisions are logged
- decision_log_records_require_approval: verify approval requests
- decision_log_accumulates_multiple_decisions: 4 decisions, check counts
- decision_log_captures_rule_id: verify rule attribution
- decision_log_captures_pane_id_and_surface: verify input metadata
- decision_log_respects_config_skip_allows: verify record_allows=false
- decision_log_records_rules_evaluated_count: verify gate counting
- decision_log_export_json: verify JSON export format

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
